feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP PUBLIC CLIOUD
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Greetings!

In public cloud Transportation app Unable to see custom field, after publishing custom field from SAP GUI.

Transportation Header able to see the custom field but same way unable to see item level.

so, please help me on this.

Advance In Thanks!

Regards,

entry.title: Mapping company codes for the replication of the workforce data from SAP MDI to S4 Hana
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

 

We are currently starting an implementation of S4 Public Cloud for one of our customers with SAP MDI and SAP SuccessFactors.

 

On the starter system (XXX) we have configured replication of workforce from SuccessFactors to S4. While all the employees are arriving with errors:

 

"Company code YYYY has not been created in financial accounting."

 

Because the company codes are different in the SF and S4.

 

Could you please tell me what can be suitable approach to map the company codes for the incoming employees from SAP MDI? And also outgoing Cost Centers to SAP MDI?

 

Is there a way to maintain a value mapping? Or it needs to be done via BAPI?

 

Thanks a lot!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S4H PUBLIC EVO and EFB parameter IDs
entry.content:
HI Experts, 

In ECC and S4H Private EVO / EFB parameter IDs can be well set. But not in Public, where I can not find those possibilities, nor the user parameters; For instance used-to-be-EVO configuration, only have one option: the inforecord creation automation.

Could you, please, let me know, if these objects are disabled in Public, or any other way to handle such cases, where used to use EVO / EFB

Thanks in advance

Maria

entry.title: Posting period issue
entry.content:
posting period is closed but system is not giving any error and posted the document in SAP.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP Joule - Identity Provisioning - No assigned Roles displayed
entry.content:
Dear Community,

Over the past few days, we have set up SAP Joule in our Public Cloud environment. This has worked well. But now we have a problem with the assigned roles in identity provisioning. When I search for a user, I get the message that there are now assigned roles for each user.

The problem now is that Joule doesn't show any results when searching for a specific app or anything else because the rules or permissions are missing. Surely the users in the public cloud have the specific roles assigned.

As additional information, we have an IAS and an IPS tenant in Cloud Identity Services.

Has anyone had the same problem so far?

Thanks for your help in advance.

Greetings Tobias

Joule SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP Cloud Identity Services

entry.title: How to add standard field in F4 help while selecting material in creation of purchase requisition?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

One of our customer wants to search material with respect to "Basic Data Text", which was maintained in material master. As customer's material description is more than 40 characters. So, they are maintaining valid description of material in "Basic Data Text" field in material master.

entry.title: Tax entry not possible in this item IN SAP
entry.content:
When we trying to post the entry in "Re process bank statement items" App  getting the error message like "Tax entry not possible in this item IN SAP", however we checked GL master data to change the Tax category from > to * , it is also not allowed me to make changes it getting error message of FH605".
BUT BUSINESS WANTS TO POST ENTRY WITHOUT TAX CODE IN "RE PROCESS BANK STATMENT ITEM APP"

Kindly suggest how to solve this issue

entry.title: Purchasing organization & Purchasing group determination in Freight order
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there any way to automatically determine purchasing org & purchasing group in freight order in public cloud? There is no any condition to determine those values. I also tried using default values but it does not work.

entry.title: Why do i get error "Object link data not configured" in Manage Documents app ?
entry.content:
Why do i get error "Object link data not configured" in Manage Documents app ?

 

I am getting error while adding BOM & routing in object link in Document management app, where as MARA is working perfectly


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Price Category if Activate/Deactivate Apps in Business Role
entry.content:
Dear,

 

Within the "Maintain Business Roles" section, there are various price categories, such as Advanced, Core, and others.

In the IAM Apps tab under "Maintain Business Roles," there are several applications listed. If I deactivate any of these applications, will the price category of the business role change?

 

Thanks! 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Custom CDS view Partner OrganizationName1 display
entry.content:
Hi Expert！

I am creating a Custom CDS view for Service Contract in Scenario: “Analytical Cube”.

I added a Partner Function to the Service Contract.
(Partner Function name Japanese”納入先"　Alias:YY1_ZIS_CUSTOM8_SRI)

I want to display address information such as "Name1" for the added Partner Function on CDSView.
Can someone please tell me how to do this?

Soma

entry.title: APIs to Fetch Business Partner Blocked using ILM in S4HANA public cloud
entry.content:
Need assistance with retrieving Business Partner details in S4HANA Public Cloud after it has been blocked using the Blocking of Business Partner Data app under Data Protection and Privacy.

Currently, when a Business Partner is blocked, the OData API (sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_BusinessPartner) does not return the corresponding record. However, I can still view the Business Partner details via the Maintain Business Partner app.

Is there a way to access the blocked Business Partner details using an API with communication user or any other way to identify which Business Partners are blocked?

The objective is to react to any Blocked Business Partner in a SAP Integrated external application.

Please provide guidance on how to achieve this.

entry.title: Unified Responsibility Management is not activated for Flexible workflow
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

Need you assistance on how to enable / activate the Unified Responsibility Management for Flexible Workflow.

Issue Description: BADI RSM_BADI_CONTEXT_ATTRIB_CALC is not getting called in Flexible workflow for SES in S/4HANA Public cloud

Details: The flexible workflow has been setup and activated for the SES/PR/PO/Contracts. For determining the agents, a Team has been setup using the Teams and Responsibilities app. The Team has a hierarchical setup with direct sub teams and team members. Additional custom responsibility definitions have been created and assigned to the team category PROC.

When the SES/Purchase Order/Contract is created, the expected approver determination is not correct. Custom responsibility definitions are not being considered. BADI RSM_BADI_CONTEXT_ATTRIB_CALC has been implemented but is not getting called.

The same BADI has also been implemented for Flexible workflow for Purchase requisitions and is getting called.

Code Debugging:

Based on the analysis, as an example, the SES workflow definition doesn’t have the unified Responsibility management property activated. This causes the SES workflow not to call the BADI RSM_BADI_CONTEXT_ATTRIB_CALC even though there is an implementation for this in S/4HANA Public cloud.

 

However, for the Purchase requisition, the unified Responsibility management is activated. This means that the BADI is getting called.

 

Any help would be appreciated.


Regards,

entry.title: PR Document type assignment on maintenance order in S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content: Hi everyone, I have recently come across a problem where I am unable to assign PR document type to maintenance order type for generation of auto purchase requisitions. System is creating auto PRs of NB document type (standard) but I am looking to use custom PR document types which have been created in the system. This configuration was available in ECC and S/4 HANA onpremise systems but I am unable to find it on SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition. Any help here would be beneficial.

entry.title: Set-up EDI connection - 2EL and 4A1
entry.content:
Hello,

 

The client wants to set up an EDI connection. We found 2 scope items that can do so, namely 2EL ( Integration of Sales with External Buyers )  and 4A1 (Automation of Order-to-Invoice with SAP Business Network ).  The difference is that scope item 4A1 uses SAP Business Network, while 2EL does not use this.

In the set-up guide of 2EL it is mentioned to create communication scenario SAP_COM_0223. However, in the set-up guide of 4A1 it is mentioned that 'This procedure describes how to deactivate the Sales with Buyers Integration (SAP_COM_0223) communication arrangement in order to set up the Sales with SAP Business Network Integration (SAP_COM_0848) communication arrangement instead.'.

However, some customers of the client have a connection to SAP Business Network, while other customers of the client do not have this. This result in the issue that we want both scope items to run. Is this possible? Or is it only possible to have 1 of the 2 scope items running at the same time?

entry.title: Set-up EDI connection - 2EL and 4A1
entry.content:
Hello,

The client wants to set up an EDI connection. We found 2 scope items that can do so, namely 2EL ( Integration of Sales with External Buyers )  and 4A1 (Automation of Order-to-Invoice with SAP Business Network ).  The difference is that scope item 4A1 uses SAP Business Network, while 2EL does not use this.

In the set-up guide of 2EL it is mentioned to create communication scenario SAP_COM_0223. However, in the set-up guide of 4A1 it is mentioned that 'This procedure describes how to deactivate the Sales with Buyers Integration (SAP_COM_0223) communication arrangement in order to set up the Sales with SAP Business Network Integration (SAP_COM_0848) communication arrangement instead.'.

However, some customers of the client have a connection to SAP Business Network, while other customers of the client do not have this. This result in the issue that we want both scope items to run. Is this possible? Or is it only possible to have 1 of the 2 scope items running at the same time?

entry.title: How to Define Min/Max Amounts for Withholding Tax
entry.content:
We need to register a minimum value or max for a specific Withholding Tax

 

 

 

 

 

Purchase Order: PHONE_NUMBER
MIRO: PHONE_NUMBER


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: IFRS: The conditions have not been assigned to the rule
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Please help solve the above error when I tried to run the valuation for the lease out contracts as per the  script 2SA_Lease-Out for Sublease Accounting - Group Ledger IFRS (2SA). I have assigned only one condition - OA10 lease out rate other with the actual rent. I can run valution for other lease in contract using IFRS valuation rule.

Is there any configuration that needed to be done beforehand?

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance SAP Real Estate Management 

 

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: How to skip the workflow step when recipients(Agents) are not determined
entry.content:
In case Agents  are not determined then system would  throw error for that workflow step. So you want to know how to make the system skip that step and go ahead further.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Assistance Required for Invoking 'CreateFixedAsset' Action of Odata v4 API from SAP CPI
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I hope this message finds you well.

https://api.sap.com/api/sap-s4-CE_FIXEDASSET_0001-v1/overview

I am currently working on posting a Fixed Asset - Master Data using the OData v4 API mentioned above. My goal is to invoke the 'CreateFixedAsset' action from the OData v4 service through SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI). However, I am encountering difficulties in triggering this action within the SAP CPI iFlow. Specifically, I am unable to find the option to call the action within the iFlow configuration.

Could you please provide detailed guidance on how to invoke the 'CreateFixedAsset' action from SAP CPI? Additionally, I would appreciate your assistance in understanding how to call the SAP__self action operation within SAP CPI.

Any insights into the required steps, configurations, or prerequisites for successfully integrating these actions would be greatly appreciated.

 

Thank you for your support. I look forward to your guidance in resolving this issue.
